title: Hindustan Unilever is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Hindustan Unilever is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Hindustan Unilever has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Jabalpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Hindustan Unilever:
Hindustan Unilever is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Quality Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hindustan Unilever!
